ORDER RE: PETITIONER STATE FARM'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES FROM RESPONDENT ROBIN PRASADI AND FOR SANCTIONS

DISCOVERY 610, PETITIONER STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $390 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

calendar.matters:
Mtn And Ntc Of Petitioner'S Mtn To Compel Responses From Respondent Robin Prasadi And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Colin R. Hatcher for petitioner and moving party: State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $390 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
